name: Monorepo layout
description: api/ (Django), ui/ (SvelteKit), crdt/ (y-websocket), transcribe/ (Whisper), deploy/ (Caddy + docker-compose), docs/ (MkDocs). Hard fork of PLASMA/papad.

name: Docker Compose services
description: Always-on: postgres (16-alpine), redis (7-alpine), api (Django), bg-app (ARQ worker), crdt (y-websocket), ui (nginx SPA). Profiles: minio (minio + minio-init), webserver (caddy with auto-HTTPS), transcribe (Whisper, 2GB limit), docs (MkDocs), backup (postgres-backup-local, 7d+4w+6m retention).

name: Reverse proxy routing
description: Two options: Nginx Proxy Manager (external nginx_network) or Caddy (--profile webserver). Routes: /api/*, /auth/*, /nimda/*, /config.json, /healthcheck/ -> api:8000. /ws/* -> crdt:1234 (WebSocket). All else -> ui:80 (SPA fallback with try_files). Security headers: HSTS, X-Frame-Options DENY, CSP, nosniff.
